name: Bob Saget
bio: Bob Saget was an American stand-up comedian, actor, and television host known for the sharp contrast between his wholesome on-screen image and his profane stand-up persona. He played Danny Tanner on Full House, hosted Americas Funniest Home Videos, and narrated How I Met Your Mother, while building a separate reputation as one of the most explicit working stand-up comedians. His 2013 album earned a Grammy nomination for Best Comedy Album.

timeline.ev: Begins playing Danny Tanner on Full House
Becomes original host of Americas Funniest Home Videos
Releases first hour stand-up special, That Aint Right, on HBO
Releases Thats What Im Talking About, nominated for a Grammy
Releases Netflix stand-up special Zero to Sixty

accolades: Grammy Award nomination for Best Comedy Album for Thats What Im Talking About (2014)
Hosted Americas Funniest Home Videos for eight seasons
